approval_statement: I explicitly approve MBTI-CROSS-APPROVAL-48 operator editorial approval for exact package SHA f5a0d286168e0d6b14e376c7230915eb97e2506214a78b50190184764d6ba59f covering only enfp-vs-entp, estj-vs-entj, and isfp-vs-infp.
